evidence.observation: Collected 133 tests and all 133 passed in 2.44s, including SQLite repository parity, deduction lifecycle, cascade cleanup, and AppState state-management behavior.
Ruff reported "All checks passed!" for src and tests.

assertionResults.reason: test_create_project_immediately_usable verified create -> mutate works without reload.
test_list_projects_empty_and_multiple covered empty and multiple summary listing.
test_load_project_restores_complete_state verified full state restoration after load.
test_save_persists_updates_across_reload and TestAppStateProject::test_save_persists verified persistence across reload.
test_no_project_loaded_failures_are_safe plus no-project AppState tests verified safe failures.
SQLite parity test plus AppState character CRUD tests covered add/update/remove behavior.
SQLite parity test plus AppState location CRUD tests covered add/update/remove behavior.
SQLite parity test and AppState script tests covered title/text/notes/source-order semantics.
SQLite parity test and AppState fact tests covered fact add/remove persistence behavior.
SQLite parity test and AppState time-slot duplicate/validation tests covered HH:MM validation and dedup behavior.
AppState time-slot ordering test plus reload parity coverage preserved ordering behavior.
SQLite parity test and AppState hint tests covered add/update/remove semantics.
SQLite parity test verified ignored-entity normalization and lookup persistence.
SQLite parity test verified merge_character appends alias to target character without creating a new entity.
SQLite parity test verified merge_location appends alias to target location without creating a new entity.
test_add_deduction_blocked_by_fact_pending_and_rejection plus TestDeductionIndex tests covered dedup against fact/pending/rejection.
test_accept_reject_clear_pending_and_reload_parity and TestDeductionIndex::test_accept_updates_fact_index verified accept creates fact and removes pending triple.
test_accept_reject_clear_pending_and_reload_parity and TestDeductionIndex::test_reject_updates_rejection_index verified reject creates rejection and removes pending triple.
test_accept_reject_clear_pending_and_reload_parity asserted the default rejection reason 用户拒绝.
test_accept_reject_clear_pending_and_reload_parity and TestDeductionIndex::test_clear_pending_resets_pending_index verified clear-pending behavior.
Cascade tests plus SQLite reload cascade parity covered character deletion cleanup.
Cascade tests plus SQLite reload cascade parity covered location deletion cleanup.
Cascade tests plus SQLite reload cascade parity covered time-slot deletion cleanup.
Cascade script cleanup tests and SQLite reload cascade parity verified script deletion only removes references.
test_accept_reject_clear_pending_and_reload_parity and TestDeductionIndex::test_index_rebuilds_on_load verified dedup-sensitive compatibility state rebuild after reload.
